input.prompt: A close-up overhead macro photograph of a circular wax seal pressed onto cream parchment paper. The wax is deep burgundy red, with natural crinkled irregular edges as if hand-pressed. Embossed into the centre of the wax in elegant copperplate calligraphic script: an interlocked monogram of the letters R and J intertwined as a single ornate cypher in 18th century royal style. The R is dominant with sweeping bowl and flourished diagonal leg, the J descends behind with a curling tail. Both letters have copperplate hairline-to-thick stroke contrast and ornamental upper flourishes. Soft directional warm light from the upper left creates depth on the embossed monogram. Editorial fine art still life photography. Museum quality. Slight film grain. Negative cream space around the seal. No background objects. 1:1 square composition centred on the wax circle.
